site.title: Mr.Minnu
site.footer: Portfolio built with Dart for the web

person.name: Yaswanth Kumar Rajavarapu
person.tagline: I ship production Flutter with clean architecture and clear ownership - from brief to release as fast as the product needs. Built for real users, real stakes, and teams that move with precision.

workSection.title: Work
workSection.subtitle: I ship Flutter apps people actually use - high-stakes learning, live markets, privacy-by-design, wearables, and the hard problems in between. Real products, real users, no portfolio fluff.

apps.copy: Enterprise digital learning for Narayana - assessments, secure exams, offline learning, and rich content across mobile, tablet, and web.
highlights: Led native-to-Flutter migration with a modular monorepo and clear feature ownership.
Owned flutter_test_engine: secure exams, Isar offline sync, trusted timers, submission flows.
Shared ui_components for HTML, LaTeX, and MathML via MathJax and flutter_math_fork.
Standards: Clean Architecture, BLoC, DI, docs - faster reviews and onboarding.

apps.copy: Trading and investing across Indian equities, mutual funds, ETFs, IPOs, F&O, commodities, and US stocks - built for performance at scale.
highlights: Watchlist, order window, dashboard, portfolio, order book, F&O scrip details, MTF, price alerts.
REST integrations for live market data, portfolio updates, and order management.
Latency-sensitive UI tuned for production trading on iOS and Android.
Shipped at hdfcsky.com.

apps.copy: White-label trading platform powering multiple brokerages from one Flutter codebase and multi-flavour architecture.
highlights: Clients include Basan, Moneysukh, Pace Trader, Pentad, Jainam, Agnik, and more from a shared stack.
Core trading modules reused with per-client customisation and deployment.
Worked with backend, QA, and product for production releases across flavours.

apps.copy: Workflow platform for automotive resale - vehicle inspection, task assignment, and daily tracking before resale.
highlights: 30–40 quality checkpoints per vehicle with status and progress tracking.
Task assignment and end-of-day work status for field teams.
API sync for inspection data, tasks, and vehicle records.

apps.copy: In-house enterprise apps for workforce and production ops - location, attendance, and operational monitoring.
highlights: Live location tracking and employee attendance modules.
Production management features with REST sync.
Stakeholder-driven feature delivery and workflow optimisation.

apps.copy: Privacy-first, decentralized platform - users own an @sign and encrypted datastore; apps sync peer-to-peer with end-to-end encryption.
highlights: Flutter apps and SDK packages on pub.dev/publishers/atsign.org.
Encrypted key-value storage and real-time P2P data sharing.
Reusable components, docs, and contributions across open-source repos.

projects.subtitle: In progress
projects.copy: Companion app to talk to the Cursor AI editor without opening the IDE - React Native client, local Node middleware, and a Swift macOS menu bar bridge.
highlights: Cross-device workflow between phone and Cursor on the Mac.

projects.subtitle: In progress
projects.copy: Wearable healthcare platform - patch hardware, Flutter app, cloud, and AI insights for heart health and long-term trends.
highlights: BLE protocol, offline-first sync, Clean Architecture + BLoC.
Backend for pairing, ingestion, notifications, and analytics.

projects.subtitle: Flutter mobile & web
projects.copy: Password-free vault using image-based master authentication - multiple tap points on an image instead of a traditional password, plus QR login on web.
highlights: Encrypted sensitive storage across mobile and web.

projects.subtitle: Open source · Pure Dart
projects.copy: Discord bot in Dart - Flutter docs, package references, and dev resources inside your server.

projects.subtitle: Open source · Dart
projects.copy: Command-line utility for @platform developers - debug, test, and manage at_server and at_client with reusable automation.

projects.subtitle: Open source contributor
projects.copy: Full-stack backend framework for Flutter - scalable services and REST APIs entirely in Dart. Top contributor to the project.

stackSection.title: Stack & community
stackSection.lead: Production mobile with Clean Architecture, offline-first data, latency-aware UI, and analytics tooling when products need it.

community.title: Flutter Hyderabad
community.body: I lead Flutter Hyderabad - packed meetups, campus workshops, and sessions that get people shipping, not slide-watching. 12+ talks on building better apps, staying secure, and going full-stack without the drama. Open source is how I pay the community back - and keep my own skills sharp.

testimonialsSection.title: Testimonials
